reviews.comment:
Esta YPF y su cafetería FULL están ubicadas en 9 de Julio y Av. Belgrano_ Avellaneda. Excelente servicio, muy buenas promociones, económicas. La única contra es que sacaron los enchufes de los Zócalos. Hace 2 años estaban.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station and its FULL cafeteria are located at 9 de Julio and Av. Belgrano in Avellaneda. Excellent service, great deals, and affordable prices. The only downside is that they removed the electrical outlets from the baseboards. They were there two years ago.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2eVpPNW5BRRAB
